murachs-mysql-3rd-edition/mysql-intro.learnerSafeSummary: MySQL is the world's most popular open-source relational database. This course covers writing SQL queries to retrieve and update data, designing databases, and using MySQL Workbench. See the textbook pages listed for full coverage.

dbms-ramakrishnan-3rd-edition/select-bas.learnerSafeSummary: The SELECT statement retrieves rows from one or more tables. Basic syntax: SELECT column1, column2 FROM table WHERE condition. Use aliases, ORDER BY to sort results, and LIMIT to restrict the number of rows returned.
